app.name: Blackwing Client
tagline: Minimal, smooth and AMOLED-black Minecraft client stack.
hero.title: Raw performance for Minecraft 1.7, 1.8 and 1.9.4
hero.subtitle: Desktop launcher, website, JSON updates and an FPS-first UI core.
feature.fps.title: Aggressive FPS preset
feature.fps.body: Particles, animations, fog and internal effects are reduced to the essentials.
feature.ui.title: Black and white HUD
feature.ui.body: Clean, readable, minimal overlay with FR/EN support.
feature.updates.title: Centralized updates
feature.updates.body: Versions, configs and patches are driven by JSON manifests.
launcher.title: Blackwing Launcher
launcher.oauthPending: Authentication is pending in your browser...
launcher.oauthUnavailable: OAuth unavailable: check backend environment variables.
website.download.signing: Signing still requires your own certificates.
footer.legal: Respect Minecraft, OptiFine and FastCraft licenses.
